title: dianthus monspessulanus var. benearnensis
intro: Dianthus monspessulanus var. benearnensis, also known as the Beni alpine pink or Beni pink, is a perennial variety of the Dianthus monspessulanus species, belonging to the carnation family of plants. It is a fragrant, pink-flowering plant that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
